title: I'll Tell the World
writer: Henry Blankfort, Nathanael West, Lester Pine
actors: Lee Tracy, Brenda Joyce, Raymond Walburn
plot: Once Gabriel "Gabby" Patton, Jr., starts talking at the age of three months, he never stops. By the time he is an adult, he has lost several insurance jobs because of his failure to allow others to speak, and his current employer ...
